2026-0423
2026-05-07PCHCanadian Race Relations Foundation ActReappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations FoundationReappointment of Anne-Marie Pham of Calgary, Alberta, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of eighteen months, effective May 27, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation
precis: Reappointment of Anne-Marie Pham of Calgary, Alberta, as a director of the Board of Directors of the Canadian Race Relations Foundation, to hold office during pleasure on a part-time basis for a term of eighteen months, effective May 27, 2026.
